condition.value: in a form which permits identification of data subjects for no longer than is necessary for the purposes for which the personal data are processed

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation regarding the duration for which personal data may be kept.
anchor: kept in a form which permits identification of data subjects for no longer than is necessary
paragraph_text: (e) kept in a form which permits identification of data subjects for no longer than is necessary for the purposes for which the personal data are processed; personal data may be stored for longer periods insofar as the personal data will be processed solely for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes in accordance with Article 89(1) subject to implementation of the appropriate technical and organisational measures required by this Regulation in order to safeguard the rights and freedoms of the data subject (‘storage limitation’);

condition.value: insofar as the personal data will be processed solely for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes in accordance with Article 89(1) subject to implementation of the appropriate technical and organisational measures required by this Regulation in order to safeguard the rights and freedoms of the data subject

classification_rationale: This statement grants a permission for extended storage under specific conditions and safeguards.
anchor: personal data may be stored for longer periods insofar as the personal data will be processed solely for archiving purposes
paragraph_text: (e) kept in a form which permits identification of data subjects for no longer than is necessary for the purposes for which the personal data are processed; personal data may be stored for longer periods insofar as the personal data will be processed solely for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes in accordance with Article 89(1) subject to implementation of the appropriate technical and organisational measures required by this Regulation in order to safeguard the rights and freedoms of the data subject (‘storage limitation’);

condition.value: over the lifetime of the system

classification_rationale: This paragraph imposes an obligation on high-risk AI systems to enable automatic event recording.
anchor: High-risk AI systems shall technically allow for the automatic recording of events (logs) over the lifetime of the system.
paragraph_text: 1. High-risk AI systems shall technically allow for the automatic recording of events (logs) over the lifetime of the system.
